issues.description: DSL is missing the core conditional logic: 'If that card is a [Sabo] with a cost of 5' condition and the subsequent 'play that card' action are not represented
FlipLife is used but should be followed by conditional checks for card type ([Sabo]) and cost (5), then PlayFromHand action
Missing PowerBoost action for 'up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power' with duration constraint 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'
TrashFromHand should be TrashSelf or the effect should clarify trashing the Character itself (this card), not a hand card. Activation is on board, not from hand
FlipLife needs conditional thenActions that check for [Sabo] type and cost 5, then execute PlayFromHand and PowerBoost with proper duration

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Reveal 1 card from the top of your Life cards. If that card is a [Sabo] with a cost of 5, you may play that card. If you do, up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
